title: SMP LPP Modpack
description: Modpack for me and my friends
body:
# About this modpack

Embark on thrilling adventures with your friends in this curated modpack designed for cooperative play. Encounter exotic creatures with [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) and [Epic Samurai's](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-samurais), while mastering combat with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) and [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords). Unleash arcane powers with [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau) and explore the wonders of [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether). Build incredible contraptions with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and journey with ease using [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack). For those who enjoy farming, [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) adds depth to agricultural pursuits. Join forces, explore, and create unforgettable memories in this immersive Minecraft experience.

# Incoming

This modpack was made with the intention to grow in mods. One of the next mod I want to add is Twilight Forest but there may be suprise to come with it...
